Bug / Task Description: AllowClaimRequest in bco-core/ratelimit.go enforces at most 2 CLAIM_REQUEST per fixed 5-second window per peer. When a request opens a new window it is allowed, but the window's running count is not seeded to include that first request, so the window effectively permits one extra claim before it starts denying. The first claim after start still looks correct, hiding the off-by-one.
Commit Subject: fix(ratelimit): seed claim-request window count on rollover
